original_image_tags: A dark, vertical rectangular document page with two hole-punch marks visible on the left margin. The top and bottom of the page are stamped "RESTRICTED" in faint, capital letters. A handwritten number "119" appears in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed document page with 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top and bottom, three punched holes on the left edge, and two punched holes near the bottom center. A small handwritten number '119-' is visible in the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Description A states two hole-punch marks on the left margin, while Description B states three punched holes on the left edge and two punched holes near the bottom center, creating a direct contradiction on the count and location of hole-punch marks.
